summary: Completed iteration 3 testing of Tebbi Medical Clinic System. Fixed critical bug in visits API (missing 'duration' field in PrescriptionItem model) and MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue. All 26 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend new visit dialog, multi-select medications/diagnoses, image upload buttons, and BMI badge all working correctly.

fixed_this_iteration.issue: PrescriptionItem model required 'duration' field but frontend didn't send it
fixed_this_iteration.fix: Made 'duration' field Optional in server.py line 266

fixed_this_iteration.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when returning visit after insert
fixed_this_iteration.fix: Added visit_dict.pop('_id', None) before return in server.py line 1002

passed_tests: Backend: Login with invalid credentials rejected
Frontend: Click patient to view details
Frontend: New Visit dialog opens with data-testid='new-visit-btn'
Frontend: Vital signs inputs (temp, BP, HR, O2) all present
Frontend: Medications dropdown multi-select with dose/frequency works
Frontend: Print Rx button appears when medications added
Frontend: Print Invoice button appears when fee added
Frontend: Image upload buttons (xray, ecg, lab_test, other) all present
Frontend: Save visit - creates visit and shows in list
Frontend: BMI badge shows 'BMI: 26.1 (زيادة)' with correct category
seed_data_creation: Updated patient محمد علي with height_cm=175, weight_kg=80 for BMI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features requested are working: 1) Multi-select medications dropdown with dose/frequency, 2) Image upload buttons (xray, ecg, lab_test, other), 3) Print prescription PDF button, 4) Print invoice PDF button, 5) BMI badge with category next to value. Backend PrescriptionItem.duration is now Optional. New visit creation flow fully functional.

visits_api_422_error.root_cause: PrescriptionItem Pydantic model required 'duration: str' field, but frontend NewVisitDialog.js only sent medication_name, dosage, frequency
visits_api_422_error.fix_applied: Changed 'duration: str' to 'duration: Optional[str] = None' in server.py line 266

visits_api_500_error.symptom: POST /api/visits returned 500 Internal Server Error after 422 fix
visits_api_500_error.root_cause: MongoDB insert_one() adds '_id' ObjectId to the dict, which is not JSON serializable when returned
visits_api_500_error.fix_applied: Added 'visit_dict.pop("_id", None)' before return in create_visit function
